name: Brown Sugar Marshmallow Icing
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the brown sugar and milk over low heat until dissolved.
2. Cover the mixture for about 3 minutes, or until the steam has washed down any crystals that may have formed on the sides of the pan.
3. Uncover and cook without stirring to 238°F.
4. Remove from the heat and add the marshmallows and butter.
5. When the ingredients are melted and the icing has cooled to 110°F, beat until it is a smooth consistency for spreading. If too thick, thin with a little cream.
6. Add a few drops of cream and chopped nuts (if desired) – about 1 1/2 cups.
